name: wilson-decision-gate
description: Step-by-step decision gate — multi-decision work is one user-confirmation gate per decision, never batched: for each branch point present options + recommendation + rationale (3+ bullets), wait for the pick, then record a `### Decision N` block in design.md. Standalone port of wilson's principle-step-by-step-decision-gate (text-only, like wilson; CC hooks can't detect batching either). SessionStart **and PostCompact** inject the principle (PostCompact lands in the clean post-summary context — the rules survive compaction); UserPromptSubmit adds a short reminder ONLY when the prompt looks like branch-point work (not every prompt). /wilson-decision-gate maintains the design.md ledger. Ships a 5-language canonical sample. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_DECISION_GATE.
